title: Issue in reading and writing in cells
author: bvaisman-GitHub

comments.author: wedsonxse
comments.body:
Exceljs doesnt support dynamic formula recalculation performed like this. If you want to recalculate your formula values, you'll need to do it when you update any member of the Formula, in your example, after changing A1 to 25 you would need to recalculate your C1 formula. 

Since Exceljs also doesnt have a native parser implementation to calculate formulas, you'll  need to use an Excel Formula support lib, i recommend Hyperformula (https://github.com/handsontable/hyperformula).

With this you can build a RecalculateFormulas() function to invoke after your value changing operations, to update all of your sheet formulas :)

comments.author: gregkonush
